message:
Command `# FOUND IT! LibreLane's open_pdks_rev IS 0fe599b2! 
# But then why is 8afc8346 appearing in error messages?
# The issue must be that the RUNNING librelane binary is pointing to the WRONG nix store package.
# Let's check which package the running librelane binary uses
which librelane
readlink -f $(which librelane)
cat $(readlink -f $(which librelane)) | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

cat $(readlink -f $(which librelane)) | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash
